current.headline: Germany vs Paraguay: start time, TV info and knockout preview
current.summary: Germany face Paraguay later in the round-of-32 schedule with pre-match coverage centered on kickoff time, likely lineups and whether Paraguay can create enough attacking volume to score once against Germany.

items.headline: Germany vs Paraguay World Cup schedule and match preview
items.summary: Preview pieces for Germany against Paraguay have locked in the Boston kickoff slot and highlighted the knockout stakes, with focus on Paraguay's chance to find a goal against a heavier favorite.
